response.justification: The candidate has roughly 14-16 years of solid software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure work, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at their current role. However, the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud-scale strategic influence. The resume shows Senior/Staff-level execution rather than Principal/Director-level scope, lacks an advanced AI-related degree, and provides no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products at scale, or advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption.
strengths: ~14-15 years across full-stack, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, OSS founder, talks, and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms at the scale or recognition the role requires
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level strategic scope
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy or advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
